---
title: 'In God We Trust, In AI We Ask: Supplementary Materials'
shorttitle: "Supplementary Materials"
authors:
  - name: Helen Huiting Zheng
    corresponding: true
    orcid: 0009-0006-2119-5531
    email: helen.zheng@bc.edu
    affiliation:
      - id: id1
        name: "Boston College"
        department: Department of Psychology and Neuroscience
  - name: Kyle Fiore Law
    orcid: 0000-0001-5911-4772
    affiliation:
      - id: id2
        name: "Arizona State University"
        group: School of Sustainability
        department: College of Global Futures\
  - name: Sara M Haman
    affiliation:
      - ref: id1
  - name: David DeSteno
    affiliation:
      - id: id3
        name: "Northeastern University"
        department: Department of Psychology
  - name: Liane Young
    affiliation:
      - ref: id1
date: "07 March 2026"
author-note:
  blank-lines-above-author-note: 2
  status-changes: null
mask: false
floatsintext: true
bibliography: references.bib
fontsize: 12pt
prefer-html: true
format:
  apaquarto-docx:
    toc: false
---

```{r setup_supp_clean, include=FALSE}
source("R/packages.R")
source("R/colors.R")
source("R/helpers.R")
source("R/tables.R")
source("R/plots.R")
source("R/demographics.R")
source("R/data-loading.R")
source("R/supplementary.R")
MANUSCRIPT_MODE <- TRUE
```

{{< include supplementary.qmd >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
